general.languageRequestDesc: Vote for the next language support on GitHub Discussions
general.previewThresholdDesc: Ask before generating video preview for files larger than this size

download.postProcessingDesc: Embed metadata and thumbnails into downloaded files
download.embedMetadataDesc: Add title, artist, description to files
download.liveFromStartDesc: Download live streams from the beginning instead of current time
download.sponsorBlockDesc: Skip sponsored segments using community data
download.sponsorBlockToggleDesc: Auto-skip sponsors & promotions in downloaded videos
download.sponsorBlockHint: Cut = remove from video (requires FFmpeg). Chapter = mark as chapter only.
download.autoRetryDesc: Automatically retry transient network and live stream errors
download.autoRetryEnableDesc: Retry failed downloads automatically when errors are temporary
download.autoRetryConfigDesc: Set retry attempts and delay between retries

dependencies.title: Dependencies
dependencies.confirmSwitchSystemYtdlp:
Switch yt-dlp source to System?

If system yt-dlp is missing or misconfigured, downloads/metadata may fail until you switch back to App managed.
dependencies.confirmSwitchSystemFfmpeg:
Switch FFmpeg source to System?

If system FFmpeg is missing or misconfigured, video processing may fail until you switch back to App managed.
dependencies.systemFfmpeg: System FFmpeg - update via package manager
dependencies.systemYtdlp: System yt-dlp - update via package manager
dependencies.systemDeno: System Deno - update via deno upgrade
dependencies.fixesUnableToDownload: Fixes "unable to download" errors on some videos

network.title: Network & Authentication
network.description: Configure cookies and proxy for downloads
network.videoAuthDesc: Access private, age-restricted, or members-only videos
network.fullDiskAccessDesc: macOS requires Full Disk Access permission to read browser cookies.
network.browserMustBeClosedDesc: On Windows, Chrome 127+ blocks cookie access (App-Bound Encryption). Close your browser completely, or use Firefox / Cookie File mode for best results.
network.cookieFileHelp: Use Netscape cookie format. Export from browser extensions like
network.networkProxyDesc: Route downloads through a proxy server

crawlerSidecar.title: Crawler Sidecar
crawlerSidecar.desc: Control the external crawler service for Google Photos and generic media pages
crawlerSidecar.scriptRequired: Script path is required to start the service.
crawlerSidecar.saveHint: Connection fields are saved locally for next launch.

crawlerTask.title: Crawler Task
crawlerTask.desc: Start and monitor crawler jobs through sidecar
crawlerTask.capabilityHint: Supports generic web pages and Google Photos, including image/gif/video/audio links.
crawlerTask.extraArgsHelp: Pass any image_crawler.py flags not exposed above (advanced).
crawlerTask.urlOrBatchRequired: Provide target URL or queue/retry file.
crawlerTask.taskRunningDetected: Another crawler task is running ({{taskId}}). Switched to that task.
crawlerTask.sidecarRequestFailed: Cannot reach sidecar for task {{taskId}}. Sidecar may have stopped; reconnect or restart the service.
crawlerTask.staleRunningRecovered: Detected stale task {{taskId}}. Started a new task {{newTaskId}} automatically.
crawlerTask.selectImportType: Select at least one media type to import.
crawlerTask.noImportableLinks: No importable links were found in task output files.
crawlerTask.previewLinksPending: The task is still scanning or has not generated preview link files yet. Try again shortly.
crawlerTask.noLinksAfterFilter: No links matched current import filters.
crawlerTask.importedOk: Imported {{added}} links to Universal queue (detected {{total}}, source: {{source}}).
crawlerTask.importedDuplicateOnly: All detected links are already in Universal queue (detected {{total}}, source: {{source}}).
crawlerTask.mediaViewerHotkeys: Hotkeys: Left/Right to browse, Esc to close.
crawlerTask.mediaBrowserEmpty: No media to preview yet. Click "Load Preview".
crawlerTask.mediaBrowserNoMatch: No media matches the current filter.
crawlerTask.retryFailedDownloadsEmpty: No failed crawler downloads were found in the current task.
crawlerTask.retryFailedDownloadsDone: Queued {{count}} failed crawler downloads for retry.
crawlerTask.retryFailedDownloadsBusy: Downloads are still running. Wait for the current batch to finish before retrying failed items.
crawlerTask.retryFailedTaskStarted: Started a retry task from the latest task's failed_downloads.txt ({{taskId}}).
crawlerTask.historyFolderRequired: Select a downloaded history folder first.
crawlerTask.historyFolderLoaded: Loaded {{shown}} preview items from history folder ({{folder}}).
crawlerTask.historyFolderDataMissing: No readable crawler data files were found under the selected history folder: {{folder}}.
crawlerTask.historyFolderNoMediaLinks: Read {{count}} history file(s), but none contained importable media links: {{source}}.
crawlerTask.retryWillUseOutput: This retry task will use output directory: {{path}}
crawlerTask.taskNoNewDownloads: Files already exist. No new downloads (existing {{existing}} items)
crawlerTask.telegraphSourceMissing: The Telegraph page is still reachable, but the original image source is gone (404 for {{count}} items). Telegram is usually showing cached previews.
crawlerTask.telegramFallbackApplied: The Telegram fallback link has been applied to the crawler task form.
crawlerTask.telegramFallbackStartInfo: Started a crawler task from the Telegram fallback link.
crawlerTask.downloadModeHint: Segmented downloads behave more like IDM; single-stream mode is useful for compatibility checks.
crawlerTask.rangeChunkHint: Leave empty for adaptive sizing; override only for unusual media hosts.
crawlerTask.transferPresetHint: This URL will auto-use {{preset}}: host {{host}} · range {{range}} · chunk {{chunk}}MB.
crawlerTask.rustTransferDetailSummary: host {{host}} · active {{active}} · pending {{pending}} · EWMA {{ewma}} · segment cap {{segmentCap}} · chunk cap {{chunkCap}} · wait {{waits}} · retry {{retries}} · tune {{tunes}} · rebalance {{rebalances}} · throttle {{throttles}} · slow {{slowWindows}} · restore {{restores}}
crawlerTask.rustTransferSummary: Rust transfers {{transfers}}, fallback {{fallback}}, mode {{mode}}, current speed {{speed}}

ai.title: AI Features
ai.summaryStyleDesc: How detailed the summary should be
ai.transcriptLanguagesDesc: Languages to try when fetching subtitles
ai.whisperDesc: Use OpenAI Whisper for videos without captions
ai.usingOpenAI: Using your OpenAI API key for Whisper
ai.whisperCompatible: Compatible with Groq, LocalAI, Faster-Whisper and other OpenAI-compatible APIs
ai.proxyModeOpenAIDesc: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions mode: uses /v1/chat/completions (or /chat/completions fallback).
ai.proxyModeResponsesDesc: Responses mode: uses /v1/responses and parses response output fields.
ai.proxyModeNewApiDesc: NewAPI/OneAPI compatible mode: prioritizes chat-completions suffixes commonly used by gateway panels.

extension.title: Browser Extension
extension.description: Download and install Youwee extension for one-click send from browser to app
extension.desktopRequiredDesc: Open Youwee at least once so your system registers the youwee:// protocol handler.
extension.chromiumDesc: Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Vivaldi, Arc, Coc Coc and other Chromium-based browsers (.zip package)
extension.guideDesc: Step-by-step setup and troubleshooting for extension connection
extension.chromiumStep2: Open chrome://extensions (or your browser extension page).
extension.chromiumStep3: Enable Developer mode, then click Load unpacked.
extension.firefoxStep2: Drag and drop the .xpi file into Firefox.
extension.firefoxStep3: Confirm installation and allow opening Youwee when prompted.

about.title: About
about.appDesc: All-in-one video toolkit — download, edit, follow channels & AI summarize
about.autoUpdateDesc: Check for updates when app opens
about.shareDesc: Share Youwee with your friends on popular social platforms.
about.shareText: Check out Youwee - a modern desktop app for downloading and processing videos.

system.title: System
system.hideDockOnCloseDesc: Remove app from Dock when the window is closed. Use the system tray icon to reopen.
system.noSettingsForPlatform: No system settings available for this platform.
